name: Pepper-Sweet Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Regular or quick rising yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Place the ingredients in the machine in the order specified by the machine's manual.
3. Since the moisture content of vegetables varies, do not add extra liquid until after the machine has kneaded enough to extract liquid from the vegetables.
4. The dough may appear dry or crumbly initially but will form a soft, round, slightly tacky ball as it develops.
5. If, at the end of kneading, no soft, round, slightly tacky ball has formed, add more liquid one tablespoon at a time until desired consistency is achieved.
